Schnittstelle CandidateAnswerRepository

Alle Superschnittstellen:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<CandidateAnswer, Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<CandidateAnswer, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<CandidateAnswer, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<CandidateAnswer, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<CandidateAnswer, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<CandidateAnswer>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<CandidateAnswer, Long>
@Repository public interface CandidateAnswerRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<CandidateAnswer, Long>

    Von Schnittstelle geerbte Methoden org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository
